creator: dburr@POBoxes.com
text:
xmame is an emulator that emulates the hardware of many classic video
(arcade) games.  You can relive your childhood or replay your favorite
coin-op classics, all you need is the images of the ROMs of the game you
want.  If you own the game yourself, you can make your own ROM images, or
you can download them off of the Internet (see the man page for details
and legal ramifications).

The distfile for this port is available at:
ftp://drake.dit.upm.es/pub/emulators/mame/xmame-0.28.1.tgz

Fix: (untar this in /usr/ports/emulators)
